content.question: What is the current legal and practical status of the government's announced structural overhaul of the Klebelsberg Center and school-district system (as of May 2026)? Has statutory reform been enacted, is it in legislative process, or does it remain a policy intention?
content.reduction_path: Monitor official government announcements and legislative databases (Hungarian Parliament website, Government Office records) for bills proposing return of maintainer authority to municipalities or school-director autonomy; track Budapest District XVIII's formal petition and any negotiation outcomes with the Ministry of Education; document timeline of any enacted reform and its effective date.
